user_prompt: 海盗金币喷发弹脸特效【视频v2】：爆一下就行——黑底，8~12枚大金币从中心干脆爆开朝屏幕，快速收/淡出。约1.5s、少粒子、无烟花光条（抽帧不穿帮）。

params.prompt_en: A very short, snappy game VFX clip on a PURE SOLID BLACK background: a SINGLE quick BURST of golden pirate coins popping outward, then settling. The coins look exactly like the reference image - a round gold coin embossed with a ship steering wheel, LARGE and clearly readable. Motion: ONE sharp pop from the center - about 8 to 12 big gold coins burst outward toward the camera and fan out a bit, then quickly settle and fade. Keep it SIMPLE and CLEAN for frame extraction: few coins, minimal sparkles, NO long radiating light rays, NO dense particle cloud, NO firework look. Punchy and fast, about 1.5 seconds total, a single burst only - NOT a fountain, NOT a slow spread, NOT a long fall. Bright treasure-gold tones, clean mobile game VFX, no text, no numbers, no UI, no characters, black background only.
params.note: v2 per feedback: fewer particles (clean frame extraction, no seams), faster ~1.5s, single punchy pop only. coin ref Item 1060.
